content.full_text:
October 22, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Re: Formal Opinion Request
Councilman David Watson

Gentlemen:

Councilman David Watson has asked me to request of your office a formal opinion respecting potential conflict of interest under the Fair Political Practices Act respecting his lease of a condominium from the Acuff Trust. The purpose of this request is to obtain an opinion which will carry immunity, rather than to rely on the written opinion issued by me as Town Attorney on June 17, 1992, which does not carry immunity.

I enclose herewith a copy of my June 17, 1992, Memorandum Opinion for your reference. If anything therein is unclear, or if you need additional information, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Sincerely yours,

PETER E. TRACY

PET/sc
Enclosures
xc: Councilman Watson
